description:
Switch from lsp-mode to Eglot for LSP support. Eglot is built into Emacs 29+,
lighter, faster to start, and has less configuration surface. Doom supports
it via `(lsp +eglot)` or a dedicated eglot module.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (doom! init block, line ~115)

Change: `lsp` → `(lsp +eglot)` or equivalent
title: Replace lsp-mode with Eglot
